text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: (It was so hot back then too.)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Reeeeally? Whyyy is it sooo hot out?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's it! I'm done! I don't wanna walk another
step!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! It only feels that way because your
room is freezing cold.
...Here, Sweepy. Put out your hand.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Like this?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: Refresh shower!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! That smells so nice! What was that?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! I just gave you a spritz of magic spray!
...Is the smell the only thing that you've noticed?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Grandma, my hands feel cool! They're not
hot at all!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Heeheehee. Right? I expect they'll cool down
even more and feel even better as you walk!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Really?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You were totally right! They're so cold! Ahaha! I
wonder how they'll feel if I run!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! ♪ Your spells are always so amazing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Grandma! Is racing magic even more
amazing than your magic just now?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: Oh, of course! Now, my best spell is—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Look, Grandma.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Really soon, I just know I'm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a break during summer camp, Sweep Tosho
wakes up from a nap she was taking under a tree.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yeah, duh! I don't have time to waste!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's Sweep Tosho! The magical girl racer!

text_block_list.name: Woman B
text_block_list.text:
No waaay! You were so cool in the Japanese
Oaks! ☆ Good luck in the Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I bet no matter who you ask, everyone
would say you're the one to look out for! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Keep your eyes on me and I'll cast my
racing magic on you too!

text_block_list.name: Women
text_block_list.text: Oooh! You're adooorable!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, after training, I'm relaxing at the campsite,
when...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh, Familiar! Perfect timing! Say "ah"!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean "why"?! Your master gave you
an order, now open your mouth!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho lays down the law with no room for
negotiation. The pressure is intense. I...
choice_data_list: Give in and open my mouth.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Heeey! What are you doing?! Familiar!
choice_data_list: I have a bad feeling about this!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Don't be such a whiny little baby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho grabs me forcefully by the cheek
and pulls me toward her.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! You're an adult, aren't you? Behave!
...Here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My mouth floods with the sweet taste of honey.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's Grandma's super special candy. It's enchanted
with the power to cheer you right up.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's been so hot lately. I don't want you passing
out on me, so I figured I'd give you some.
choice_data_list: Thank you for thinking of me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's the only one you're getting. I've only got
two left!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The candy she gave me is sweeter than any I've
ever had before. I can feel the sugar spreading
through me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe! There's a good familiar! ...Here you go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eeeee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The overpowering taste of raw vegetables fills my
mouth. It's likely something fresh from the
ground, seasoned only by Mother Nature...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Grandma always says mugwort is the queen
of herbs.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's been so hot recently, you gotta make sure
you're getting all your nutrition!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's a magical girl's job to take care of her
familiars! Duh!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Guess I might as well have some too...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What's with you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What? Are you trying to keep all the mugwort for
yourself or something?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Not happening! I can't afford to pass out over
here!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: But I get it. Mugwort really is just the best, right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I was so happy when Grandma gave me some for
the first time!
choice_data_list: I'm guessing that's because it was cooked...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chomp!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaaah! That's bitter!
